Class RedisKeyValueTemplate.RedisKeyValueCallback<T>

T -

Enclosing class:

public abstract static class RedisKeyValueTemplate.RedisKeyValueCallback<T> extends Object implements KeyValueCallback<T>
Redis specific KeyValueCallback.
